content.speakerText: Hi, thanks for coming in today. Could you start by telling me a bit about yourself?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，感谢你今天来，能先简单介绍一下自己吗？

options.text: I'm okay, I guess. I like coffee and cats.
Sure! I'm a marketing professional with 3 years of experience in digital campaigns.
I don't know what to say. I'm just nervous.
I graduated last year, but I haven't done anything important yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体的职业背景和经验，符合面试回应的专业性要求。选项1和3过于随意或消极，不符合面试语境；选项4自我贬低，会削弱面试官的信心。

content.speakerText: Welcome! To begin, could you share a little about your professional background?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎！首先，你能简单谈谈你的职业背景吗？

options.text: I used to work at a restaurant, but now I'm just looking for something better.
Of course! I've spent the last five years as a project manager in tech, leading teams of 8–12 people.
Can we skip this part? I'm not good at talking about myself.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体职位、时长和职责，体现专业性和细节。选项1消极且无关；选项3空泛夸张；选项4拒绝回答，不符合面试礼仪。

content.speakerText: Thanks for joining us. Would you mind giving a quick overview of your experience and what you bring to the role?
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你的加入。你能简要概述一下你的经验以及你能为这个职位带来什么吗？

options.text: I'm not sure. I guess I'm hardworking?
Absolutely. I specialize in data analysis and have improved reporting efficiency by 40% in my last role.
I like working with people and I'm pretty friendly.
I read your company website. You seem nice.

content.explanation: 正确答案结合了专业技能和量化成果，符合面试高分回应标准。选项1和3缺乏具体性；选项4偏离主题，未回应经验或价值贡献。

content.template: Sure! I'm a ___ professional with 3 years of experience in digital campaigns.
content.hint: 这是常见的职业领域，与数字营销相关
content.knowledgePoint: 职业领域词汇（场景高频词汇）

content.template: Could you start by telling me a bit about ___?
content.hint: 面试官引导自我介绍时的标准表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（自我介绍引导句型）

content.template: I've been working in ___ for a while now and I'm pretty good at closing deals.
content.hint: 这是与'closing deals'（签单）最相关的行业
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（行业与技能匹配）

content.speakerText: Hi, thanks for coming in today. Could you start by telling me a bit about yourself?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，感谢你今天来，能先简单介绍一下自己吗？
expectedAnswers: I'm a recent graduate in business administration with an internship in market research.
I've worked as a customer service representative for two years and recently completed a certification in CRM systems.
As a digital marketer with three years of experience, I've led campaigns that increased engagement by 60% across social platforms.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了自我介绍的要求
语言准确性：语法正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：是否符合口语习惯，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含职业身份、经验时长、核心技能或成就

content.speakerText: Welcome! To begin, could you share a little about your professional background?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎！首先，你能简单谈谈你的职业背景吗？
expectedAnswers: I've been in project management for five years, mostly in software development teams.
I started as an intern and worked my way up to team lead in retail operations.
My background is in finance—I’ve handled budgeting and forecasting for mid-sized companies.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否聚焦于专业背景而非个人生活
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态和职业术语
表达自然度：语句流畅，有适当停顿和语调
关键词覆盖：是否包含行业、职位、时长或职责

content.speakerText: Thanks for joining us. Would you mind giving a quick overview of your experience and what you bring to the role?
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你的加入。你能简要概述一下你的经验以及你能为这个职位带来什么吗？
expectedAnswers: I have strong analytical skills and have consistently improved team reporting accuracy by 30%.
I'm skilled in cross-functional collaboration and have successfully led projects with remote teams.
I combine technical expertise in data tools with a customer-first mindset, which helped reduce churn by 25%.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否同时涵盖经验与价值贡献
语言准确性：使用专业动词（improved, led, reduce）和量化表达
表达自然度：语气自信但不夸张，结构清晰
关键词覆盖：是否包含技能、成果、与岗位的相关性
